title: Comparative and Quantitative Global Proteomics Approaches: An Overview.
author: Deracinois B Flahaut C Duban-Deweer S Karamanos Y
content: S-EPMC5302699 PMC5302699 Comparative and Quantitative Global Proteomics Approaches: An Overview. Proteomics became a key tool for the study of biological systems. The comparison between two different physiological states allows unravelling the cellular and molecular mechanisms involved
